productDisplayName: Puma Men II Biz White Shoes
description: These stylish II Biz shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic upper for durability and protectionPerforations on sides for enhanced breathabilityLace-ups for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortBrand name printed on the tongue and cat logo behind collarFormstripe on the sides for added style and structureMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day comfortEVA midsole for greater shock absorptionOutsoleNon-slip rubber outsole for greater tractionWaffle pattern for greater flexibility of the feetshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
